title: Spec and implement round completion reward loop
intent: Create the first retention-focused Polaxory game improvement: a short reward loop after round completion that gives players a reason to replay.
playerPromise: Finishing a round should feel like progress, not a dead end.
whyNow: The command room's current strongest signal is replay intent after round completion. A visible non-paid reward loop is low risk and creates a measurable retention hook.

include: Reward presentation immediately after round completion
A small progress currency or key awarded for completion
A replay CTA that explains the next achievable reward
Instrumentation events for reward_shown, reward_claimed, and replay_clicked
exclude: Live Roblox API integration in this task

implementationPlan.name: Define reward contract
implementationPlan.output: Shared reward-loop config and task spec

implementationPlan.name: Add server completion hook
implementationPlan.output: Server module can grant v0 completion reward from round result

implementationPlan.name: Add client reward surface
implementationPlan.output: Round-end UI can show reward, progress, and replay CTA

implementationPlan.name: Add analytics seam
implementationPlan.output: Named events exist even before analytics backend is wired

acceptanceCriteria: Reward appears immediately after round completion.
Reward communicates progress or unlock intent.
Loop does not require paid mechanics in v0.
Implementation can be measured through replay/session signals later.
Task can be picked up by a patch generator without reading the manifesto docs.

measurement.primaryMetric: Replay click rate after completed round
